error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key — please check your token at motorapi.dk.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Motor API. Check your network connection.
error.timeout: The request timed out. Try again.

lookup_vehicle.name: Look up vehicle
lookup_vehicle.description: Fetches full vehicle details from the Danish Motor API by registration number. Returns the full data as a response variable.

registration_number.name: Registration number
registration_number.description: The Danish vehicle registration (number plate), e.g. AB12345.

vehicle_not_found.message: No vehicle found for registration number '{registration_number}'.

invalid_auth.message: The configured API key was rejected. Re-configure the integration with a valid key.

rate_limited.message: Motor API daily quota exceeded. Try again tomorrow.

api_error.message: Motor API returned an unexpected error (HTTP {status}).

cannot_connect.message: Could not connect to Motor API. Check your network.

timeout.message: The request to Motor API timed out.
